package rulecoverage

func NegativeFmtFprintToBytesBuffer() string {
    ruleID := "fmt_fprint_to_bytes_buffer"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`fmt.Fprint(&buf, ...)` instead of direct buffer writes."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
